title: PRACTICE ROUTINES: POSITIVE BEHAVIOR SUPPORT FOR PARENTS - 211info
text: TWO FAMILIES NOW PRACTICE ROUTINES: POSITIVE BEHAVIOR SUPPORT FOR PARENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Online and offline options available, teaching families of children with special needs and behavioral challenges how to implement effective strategies and routines using a positive behavior support approach. 1203 Willamette Street Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 343-4747 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 343-4747 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: $49 for 3 months of access DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Tech Support available Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Parenting Skills Classes Parenting Skills Classes * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TWO FAMILIES NOW: EFFECTIVE PARENTING DURING SEPARATION AND DIVORCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
